steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: An introductory phrase like "Multidisciplinary at its core" must be immediately followed by the noun it modifies. Ask: what is multidisciplinary at its core? The artist's body of work — not the artist personally.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'wrong noun follows the phrase': the subject placed after the comma is not 'body of work,' so the modifier dangles. ✗
  • Choice B — 'correct noun delayed': 'body of work' does not appear immediately after the introductory phrase. ✗
  • Choice C — 'grammatical error': introduces a construction error in addition to misplacing the noun. ✗
  • Choice D — ''body of work' is the subject': places 'body of work' directly after the comma, satisfying the modifier rule. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
